response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his ability to deliver on the core C++-centric routing tile pipeline requirements.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages and systems (DLang, C++, Node.js)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript stacks, not low-latency systems or distributed geospatial data
Limited evidence of operating system or distributed systems work beyond basic DevOps
